C:\Users\zramd\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\Python314\Lib\site-packages\cmake\data\bin\cmake.exe -E rm -f CMakeFiles\image_lab_backend.dir/objects.a
C:\msys64\mingw64\bin\ar.exe qc CMakeFiles\image_lab_backend.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\image_lab_backend.dir\objects1.rsp
C:\msys64\mingw64\bin\c++.exe -shared -o image_lab_backend.pyd -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\image_lab_backend.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive @CMakeFiles\image_lab_backend.dir\linkLibs.rsp
